name: Filestash
description: A modern web-based file manager for your DigitalOcean Spaces (S3-compatible) storage. Provides a beautiful interface to browse, upload, download, edit, and share files.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the Filestash admin panel (/admin). Required for initial setup.

APPLICATION_URL.description: The public URL of your Filestash instance (e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com). Used for CORS, redirects, and shared links.

S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: DigitalOcean Spaces access key ID. Found in DO Control Panel > API > Spaces Keys.

S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: DigitalOcean Spaces secret access key. Shown once when you generate the key.

S3_ENDPOINT.description: DigitalOcean Spaces endpoint URL (e.g. https://sgp1.digitaloceanspaces.com). Must include the region.

S3_REGION.description: DigitalOcean Spaces region (e.g. nyc3, sfo3, sgp1, fra1, ams3, syd1). Must match the endpoint.

S3_BUCKET.description: Default S3 bucket (Space name) to open on login. Leave empty to show all buckets.

LOCAL_BACKEND_SECRET.description: Password for local storage. Default: local_password

FILESTASH_MIDDLEWARE__IDENTITY_PROVIDER_.description: Authentication middleware parameters. Default configures user:password

FILESTASH_MIDDLEWARE__ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_.description: Related backend labels for the identity provider

FILESTASH_PORT.description: Port the application listens on. Automatically set by Heroku via $PORT — do not override unless necessary.

CONFIG_SECRET.description: Encryption key for sensitive config values. Auto-generated if not set. Set this to persist config encryption across dyno restarts.

CONFIG_ENCRYPT.description: Enable/disable config encryption. Set to 'false' to disable. Default: true.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging verbosity. Options: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR. Default: INFO.

FILESTASH_GENERAL__SECRET_KEY.description: The key that's used to encrypt and decrypt session content and shared links. If left empty, it will be automatically generated. Use with caution (maps to general.secret_key).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__NAME.description: Name as shown in the UI. Default: 'Filestash' (maps to general.name).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__HOST.description: The host people need to use to access this server. Eg: 'demo.filestash.app' (maps to general.host).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FORCE_SSL.description: Enable the web security mechanism called 'Strict Transport Security'. Default: false (maps to general.force_ssl).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__EDITOR.description: Keybinding to be use in the editor. Default: 'emacs' (maps to general.editor).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__LOGOUT.description: Redirection URL whenever user click on the logout button (maps to general.logout).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__DISPLAY_HIDDEN.description: Should files starting with a dot be visible by default? Default: false (maps to general.display_hidden).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__REFRESH_AFTER_UPLOAD.description: Refresh directory listing after upload. Default: false (maps to general.refresh_after_upload).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__OPEN_MODE.description: How files and folders are opened in the file browser. Default: 'single_click' (maps to general.open_mode).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_BUTTON.description: Display the upload button on any device. Default: false (maps to general.upload_button).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_POOL_SIZE.description: Maximum number of files upload in parallel. Default: 15 (maps to general.upload_pool_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_CHUNK_SIZE.description: Size of Chunks for Uploads in MB. Default: 0 (maps to general.upload_chunk_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__BUFFER_SIZE.description: I/O buffer size for transfers. Larger buffers boost throughput on 20 GbE+ networks but use more memory. Default: 'medium' (maps to general.buffer_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FILEPAGE_DEFAULT_VIEW.description: Default layout for files and folder on the file page. Default: 'grid' (maps to general.filepage_default_view).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FILEPAGE_DEFAULT_SORT.description: Default order for files and folder on the file page. Default: 'type' (maps to general.filepage_default_sort).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__COOKIE_TIMEOUT.description: Authentication Cookie expiration in minutes. Default: 60 * 24 * 7 = 1 week (maps to general.cookie_timeout).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__EXTENDED_SESSION.description: Store extra auth data in session. Default: false (maps to general.extended_session).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__CUSTOM_CSS.description: Setcustom css code for your instance (maps to general.custom_css).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__API__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable the API. Default: true (maps to features.api.enable).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable the share feature. Default: true (maps to features.share.enable).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__DEFAULT_ACCES.description: Default access for shared links. Default: 'editor' (maps to features.share.default_access).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__REDIRECT.description: When set, shared links will perform a redirection to another link. Example: https://example.com?full_path={{path}} (maps to features.share.redirect).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__IFRAME.description: list of domains who can use the application from an iframe. eg: https://example.com (maps to features.protection.iframe).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__ENABLE_C.description: Enable users to stream content on a chromecast device. This feature requires the browser to access google's server to download the chromecast SDK. Default: true (maps to features.protection.enable_chromecast).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__SIGNATUR.description: Enforce signature when using URL parameters in the authentication process (maps to features.protection.signature).

FILESTASH_LOG__ENABLE.description: Enable/disable logging. Default: true (maps to log.enable).

FILESTASH_LOG__TELEMETRY.description: We won't share anything with any third party. This will only to be used to improve our software. Default: false (maps to log.telemetry).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__SERVER.description: Address of the SMTP email server. Default: 'smtp.gmail.com' (maps to email.server).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__PORT.description: Port of the SMTP email server. Eg: 587. Default: 587 (maps to email.port).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__USERNAME.description: The username for authenticating to the SMTP server. Eg: 'username@gmail.com' (maps to email.username).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__PASSWORD.description: The password associated with the SMTP username. Eg: 'Your google password' (maps to email.password).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__FROM.description: Email address visible on sent messages. Eg: 'username@gmail.com' (maps to email.from).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable full text search automatic indexing. Default: false.

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__FOLDER_EXCLU.description: Exclude some specific folder from the crawl / index. Default: node_modules,bower_components,.cache,.npm,.git

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__PROCESS_MAX.description: Size of the pool containing the indexers. Default: 5

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__PROCESS_PAR.description: How many concurrent indexers are running in the same time. Default: 2

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__REINDEX_TIME.description: Time in hours after which we consider our index to be stale. Default: 24

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__SHARED_INDEX.description: Use a single search index shared across all users. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__CYCLE_TIME.description: Time allocation for each cycle in seconds. Default: 10

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__MAX_SIZE.description: Maximum size of files the indexer will perform full text search. Default: 524288000

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__INDEXER_EXT.description: Extensions that will be handled by the full text search engine. Default: org,txt,docx,pdf,md,form,xlsx,pptx

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SEARCH__EXPLORE_TIME.description: When full text search is disabled, the search engine recursively explore directories. Timeout in ms. Default: 1500

FILESTASH_FEATURES__WORKFLOW__WORKERS.description: Number of workers running in parallel. Default: 1

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__ZIP_TIME.description: Timeout when user wants to download or extract a zip. Default: 60

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__DISABLE_.description: Disable the content security policy. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable active protection against scanners. Default: true

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__DISABLE_.description: Disable the display of SVG documents. Default: true

FILESTASH_FEATURES__VIDEO__ENABLE_TRANSC.description: Enable/Disable on demand video transcoding. Default: true

FILESTASH_FEATURES__VIDEO__BLACKLIST_FOR.description: Video format that won't be transcoded

FILESTASH_FEATURES__VIDEO__ENCODER.description: Video encoder used for on demand HLS transcoding. Default: libx264

FILESTASH_FEATURES__VIDEO__ENABLE_THUMBN.description: Enable/Disable on video thumbnail generation. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__IMAGE__THUMBNAIL_CAC.description: How much time in seconds we want to store a thumbnail in the browser. Default: 259200

FILESTASH_FEATURES__IMAGE__IMAGE_QUALITY.description: Image quality on fullsize images. Default: 90

FILESTASH_FEATURES__IMAGE__IMAGE_CACHING.description: How much time in seconds we want to store images on the browser. Default: 3600

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable the office suite and options to manage documents. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__ONLYOFFICE_S.description: Location of your OnlyOffice server. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8080

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_CHAT.description: Enable/Disable chat in onlyoffice. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_COPY.description: Enable/Disable copy text in onlyoffice. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_COMMENT.description: Enable/Disable comments in onlyoffice. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_EDIT.description: Enable/Disable editing in onlyoffice. Default: true

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_DOWNLOAD.description: Display Download button in onlyoffice. Default: true

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_PRINT.description: Enable/Disable printing in onlyoffice. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__OFFICE_SERVE.description: Location of your WOPI Office server. Default: http://127.0.0.1:9980

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__FILESTASH_SE.description: Location of your Filestash server from the point of view of the office server. Default: http://app:8334

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__REWRITE_DISC.description: Rewrite the discovery URL to something else

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SYNCTHING__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable integration with the syncthing server. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SITE__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable the creation of site via shared links. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SITE__AUTOINDEX.description: Enables or disables automatic directory listing when no index file is present. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SITE__CORS_ALLOW_ORI.description: List of allowed origins for CORS. Use '*' to allow all origins

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SERVER__CONSOLE_ENAB.description: Enable/Disable the interactive web console on your instance. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__RECENT__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable recent files tracking. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__RECENT__FOLDER_NAME.description: Name of the folder for recent files

FILESTASH_FEATURES__RECENT__ENABLE_AI.description: Enable AI categorization for recent files. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__DESCRIPTION__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable adding descriptions to files. Default: false

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SERVER__TOR_URL.description: Tor onion URL for exposing Filestash

FILESTASH_FEATURES__OFFICE__CAN_PRINT.description: Enable/Disable printing in OnlyOffice. Default: false
